calendar.matters:
NOTICE OF COURT HEARING (ELDER OR DEPENDENT ADULT ABUSE)
Off Calendar Jan-23-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: All Parties sworn prior to commencement of the proceeding.

Appearances: Conchita Daguman (Petitioner). Pedro Munoz (Respondent). Christine Balubata (Tagalog Interpreter for Pedro Munoz). Ken Wong (Social Worker for both parties).

The Respondent stated that he has no objections to the Stay Away Order and that he has already moved out. The Court found that the Respondent has not offered any evidence to contradict the petition and that he is willing to stay away and moved out and the Court granted the Petitioner's request is Granted as follows: Respondent shall stay at least 100 yards away from the protected person: Conchita Daguman and he must move out from and not return to 202 Santos Street, San Francisco, CA. The Restraining Order does not include the son. The Petitioner is willing to give the Respondent up to two months to move his personal belongings. The Court ordered that the Respondent's personal belongs must be removed by 5 p.m. on March 23, 2013 by a third party.

No Guns or Other Firearms.

Expires: January 23, 2018 at 5:00 p.m.

Order signed in open court.

Judge: Lillian K. Sing. Court Reporter: Tony Vaughn CSR #6185. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Sr. Deputy M. Benton.
